text:
| **Identity/ordinals** | Agent key loaded (debug), agent key created (info with path), ordinal slot allocated (info with label e.g. `smith2`), ordinal released, preferred ordinal occupied (warn) | [...]    - **`src/identity.rs`**
     - Key loaded from disk: `tracing::debug!(slug, pubkey = %&stored.public_key[..8], "agent key loaded")`
     - Key created first time: `tracing::info!(slug, pubkey = %&stored.public_key[..8], path = %path.display(), "agent key created")`

   - **`src/daemon/server/session_signer.rs`**
     - `select_and_reserve`: reassert path → `tracing::debug!(session, agent, h, ordinal, "ordinal reasserted")`; preferred ordinal occupied → `tracing::warn!` with preferred value; fresh allocation → `tracing::info!(session, agent, h, ordinal, label, "ordinal slot allocated")`
     - `release`: collect freed slots before retain, then `tracing::info!(session, h, ordinal, "ordinal slot released")` for each
